# Data Model: mos_target_mangadapall_parquet


MOS Target Table: mangadapall


## Contents
- [Basic Information](#basic-information)
- [Changelog](#changelog)
- [Example DATAFRAME List](#example-dataframe-list)
- [Notes](#notes)
- [Regrets](#regrets)
---

## Basic Information
Final summary file of the MaNGA Data Analysis Pipeline (DAP).

### Naming Convention
$MOS_TARGET/[V_TARG]/[FTYPE]/mos_mangadapall.[FTYPE] with FTYPE='parquet' and V_TARG='2.0.0' for DR20.

### Releases
DR20

### Enviroments
MOS_TARGET

### Approximate Size
104 MB

### File Type
PARQUET

### Generated by Product
sdss5db targeting database.

### Is a VAC
False

### Data Level
2.3.3

### DATAFRAME List for release DR20
- Primary data frame.

---

## Changelog
Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another

## Example DATAFRAME List

### Columns


#### plate

- Column Name: plate
- Description: Plate number
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int32


#### ifudesign

- Column Name: ifudesign
- Description: IFU design number
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int32


#### plateifu

- Column Name: plateifu
- Description: String combination of PLATE-IFU to ease searching
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### mangaid

- Column Name: mangaid
- Description: MaNGA ID string
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### drpallindx

- Column Name: drpallindx
- Description: Row index of the observation in the DRPall file
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int32


#### mode

- Column Name: mode
- Description: 3D mode of the DRP file (CUBE or RSS)
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### daptype

- Column Name: daptype
- Description: Keyword of the analysis approach used (e.g., HYB10-GAU-MILESHC)
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### dapdone

- Column Name: dapdone
- Description: Flag that MAPS file successfully produced
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Extension('arrow.opaque', Binary, '{"type_name": "bit", "vendor_name": "PostgreSQL"}')


#### objra

- Column Name: objra
- Description: RA of the galaxy center
- Unit: deg
- Data Type: Float64


#### objdec

- Column Name: objdec
- Description: Declination of the galaxy center
- Unit: deg
- Data Type: Float64


#### ifura

- Column Name: ifura
- Description: RA of the IFU pointing center (generally the same as OBJRA)
- Unit: deg
- Data Type: Float64


#### ifudec

- Column Name: ifudec
- Description: Declination of the IFU pointing center (generally the same as OBJDEC)
- Unit: deg
- Data Type: Float64


#### mngtarg1

- Column Name: mngtarg1
- Description: Main survey targeting bit
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int32


#### mngtarg2

- Column Name: mngtarg2
- Description: Non-galaxy targeting bit
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int32


#### mngtarg3

- Column Name: mngtarg3
- Description: Ancillary targeting bit
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int32


#### z

- Column Name: z
- Description: Redshift used to set initial guess velocity (typically identical to NSA_Z)
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### ldist_z

- Column Name: ldist_z
- Description: Luminosity distance based on Z and a standard cosmology
- Unit: h^{-1} Mpc
- Data Type: Float32


#### adist_z

- Column Name: adist_z
- Description: Angular-diameter distance based on Z and a standard cosmology
- Unit: h^{-1} Mpc
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_z

- Column Name: nsa_z
- Description: Redshift from the NASA-Sloan Atlas
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_zdist

- Column Name: nsa_zdist
- Description: NSA distance estimate using pecular velocity model of Willick et al. (1997); multiply by c/H0 for Mpc.
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### ldist_nsa_z

- Column Name: ldist_nsa_z
- Description: Luminosity distance based on NSA_Z and a standard cosmology
- Unit: h^{-1} Mpc
- Data Type: Float32


#### adist_nsa_z

- Column Name: adist_nsa_z
- Description: Angular-diameter distance based on NSA_Z and a standard cosmology
- Unit: h^{-1} Mpc
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_ba

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_ba
- Description: NSA isophotal axial ratio from elliptical Petrosian analysis
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_phi

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_phi
- Description: NSA isophotal position angle from elliptical Petrosian analysis
- Unit: deg
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_th50_r

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_th50_r
- Description: NSA elliptical Petrosian effective radius in the r-band; the is the same as R_{e} below.
- Unit: arcsec
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_ba

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_ba
- Description: NSA isophotal axial ratio from Sersic fit
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_phi

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_phi
- Description: NSA isophotal position angle from Sersic fit
- Unit: deg
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_th50

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_th50
- Description: NSA effective radius from the Sersic fit
- Unit: arcsec
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_n

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_n
- Description: NSA Sersic index
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### versdrp2

- Column Name: versdrp2
- Description: Version of DRP used for 2d reductions
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### versdrp3

- Column Name: versdrp3
- Description: Version of DRP used for 3d reductions
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### verscore

- Column Name: verscore
- Description: Version of mangacore used by the DAP
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### versutil

- Column Name: versutil
- Description: Version of idlutils used by the DAP
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### versdap

- Column Name: versdap
- Description: Version of mangadap
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### drp3qual

- Column Name: drp3qual
- Description: DRP 3D quality bit
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int32


#### dapqual

- Column Name: dapqual
- Description: DAP quality bit
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int32


#### rdxqakey

- Column Name: rdxqakey
- Description: Configuration keyword for the method used to assess the reduced data
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### binkey

- Column Name: binkey
- Description: Configuration keyword for the spatial binning method
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### sckey

- Column Name: sckey
- Description: Configuration keyword for the method used to model the stellar-continuum
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### elmkey

- Column Name: elmkey
- Description: Configuration keyword that defines the emission-line moment measurement method
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### elfkey

- Column Name: elfkey
- Description: Configuration keyword that defines the emission-line modeling method
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### sikey

- Column Name: sikey
- Description: Configuration keyword that defines the spectral-index measurement method
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### bintype

- Column Name: bintype
- Description: Type of binning used
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### binsnr

- Column Name: binsnr
- Description: Target for bin S/N, if Voronoi binning
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### tplkey

- Column Name: tplkey
- Description: The identifier of the template library, e.g., MILES.
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### datedap

- Column Name: datedap
- Description: Date the DAP file was created and/or last modified.
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### dapbins

- Column Name: dapbins
- Description: The number of "binned" spectra analyzed by the DAP.
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int32


#### rcov90

- Column Name: rcov90
- Description: Semi-major axis radius (R) below which spaxels cover at least 90% of elliptical annuli with width R +/- 2.5 arcsec. This should be independent of the DAPTYPE.
- Unit: arcsec
- Data Type: Float32


#### snr_med_g

- Column Name: snr_med_g
- Description: Median S/N per pixel in the ''griz'' bands within 1.0-1.5 R_{e}. This should be independent of the DAPTYPE. Measurements specifically for g.
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### snr_med_r

- Column Name: snr_med_r
- Description: Median S/N per pixel in the ''griz'' bands within 1.0-1.5 R_{e}. This should be independent of the DAPTYPE. Measurements specifically for r.
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### snr_med_i

- Column Name: snr_med_i
- Description: Median S/N per pixel in the ''griz'' bands within 1.0-1.5 R_{e}. This should be independent of the DAPTYPE. Measurements specifically for i.
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### snr_med_z

- Column Name: snr_med_z
- Description: Median S/N per pixel in the ''griz'' bands within 1.0-1.5 R_{e}. This should be independent of the DAPTYPE. Measurements specifically for z.
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### snr_ring_g

- Column Name: snr_ring_g
- Description: S/N in the ''griz'' bands when binning all spaxels within 1.0-1.5 R_{e}. This should be independent of the DAPTYPE. Measurements specifically for g.
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### snr_ring_r

- Column Name: snr_ring_r
- Description: S/N in the ''griz'' bands when binning all spaxels within 1.0-1.5 R_{e}. This should be independent of the DAPTYPE. Measurements specifically for r.
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### snr_ring_i

- Column Name: snr_ring_i
- Description: S/N in the ''griz'' bands when binning all spaxels within 1.0-1.5 R_{e}. This should be independent of the DAPTYPE. Measurements specifically for i.
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### snr_ring_z

- Column Name: snr_ring_z
- Description: S/N in the ''griz'' bands when binning all spaxels within 1.0-1.5 R_{e}. This should be independent of the DAPTYPE. Measurements specifically for z.
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### sb_1re

- Column Name: sb_1re
- Description: Mean g-band surface brightness of valid spaxels within 1 R_e}. This should be independent of the DAPTYPE.
- Unit: 10^{-17} erg/s/cm^{2}/angstrom/spaxel
- Data Type: Float32


#### bin_rmax

- Column Name: bin_rmax
- Description: Maximum g-band luminosity-weighted semi-major radius of any "valid" binned spectrum.
- Unit: R_{e}
- Data Type: Float32


#### bin_r_n_05

- Column Name: bin_r_n_05
- Description: Number of binned spectra with g-band luminosity-weighted centers within 0-1, 0.5-1.5, and 1.5-2.5 R_{e}. Measurements specifically for 05.
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### bin_r_n_10

- Column Name: bin_r_n_10
- Description: Number of binned spectra with g-band luminosity-weighted centers within 0-1, 0.5-1.5, and 1.5-2.5 R_{e}. Measurements specifically for 10.
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### bin_r_n_20

- Column Name: bin_r_n_20
- Description: Number of binned spectra with g-band luminosity-weighted centers within 0-1, 0.5-1.5, and 1.5-2.5 R_{e}. Measurements specifically for 20.
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### bin_r_snr_05

- Column Name: bin_r_snr_05
- Description: Median g-band S/N of all binned spectra with luminosity-weighted centers within 0-1, 0.5-1.5, and 1.5-2.5 R_{e}. Measurements specifically for 05.
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### bin_r_snr_10

- Column Name: bin_r_snr_10
- Description: Median g-band S/N of all binned spectra with luminosity-weighted centers within 0-1, 0.5-1.5, and 1.5-2.5 R_{e}. Measurements specifically for 10.
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### bin_r_snr_20

- Column Name: bin_r_snr_20
- Description: Median g-band S/N of all binned spectra with luminosity-weighted centers within 0-1, 0.5-1.5, and 1.5-2.5 R_{e}. Measurements specifically for 20.
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### stellar_z

- Column Name: stellar_z
- Description: Flux-weighted mean redshift of the stellar component within a 2.5 arcsec aperture at the galaxy center.
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### stellar_vel_lo

- Column Name: stellar_vel_lo
- Description: Stellar velocity at 2.5% growth of all valid spaxels.
- Unit: km/s
- Data Type: Float32


#### stellar_vel_hi

- Column Name: stellar_vel_hi
- Description: Stellar velocity at 97.5% growth of all valid spaxels.
- Unit: km/s
- Data Type: Float32


#### stellar_vel_lo_clip

- Column Name: stellar_vel_lo_clip
- Description: Stellar velocity at 2.5% growth after iteratively clipping 3-sigma outliers.
- Unit: km/s
- Data Type: Float32


#### stellar_vel_hi_clip

- Column Name: stellar_vel_hi_clip
- Description: Stellar velocity at 97.5% growth after iteratively clipping 3-sigma outliers.
- Unit: km/s
- Data Type: Float32


#### stellar_sigma_1re

- Column Name: stellar_sigma_1re
- Description: Flux-weighted mean stellar velocity dispersion of all spaxels within 1 R_{e}.
- Unit: km/s
- Data Type: Float32


#### stellar_rchi2_1re

- Column Name: stellar_rchi2_1re
- Description: Median reduced chi^{2} of the stellar-continuum fit within 1 R_{e}. [
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### ha_z

- Column Name: ha_z
- Description: Flux-weighted mean redshift of the Ha line within a 2.5 arcsec aperture at the galaxy center.
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### ha_gvel_lo

- Column Name: ha_gvel_lo
- Description: Gaussian-fitted velocity of the H-alpha line at 2.5% growth of all valid spaxels.
- Unit: km/s
- Data Type: Float32


#### ha_gvel_hi

- Column Name: ha_gvel_hi
- Description: Gaussian-fitted velocity of the H-alpha line at 97.5% growth of all valid spaxels.
- Unit: km/s
- Data Type: Float32


#### ha_gvel_lo_clip

- Column Name: ha_gvel_lo_clip
- Description: Gaussian-fitted velocity of the H-alpha line at 2.5% growth after iteratively clipping 3-sigma outliers.
- Unit: km/s
- Data Type: Float32


#### ha_gvel_hi_clip

- Column Name: ha_gvel_hi_clip
- Description: Gaussian-fitted velocity of the H-alpha line at 97.5% growth after iteratively clipping 3-sigma outliers.
- Unit: km/s
- Data Type: Float32


#### ha_gsigma_1re

- Column Name: ha_gsigma_1re
- Description: Flux-weighted H-alpha velocity dispersion (from Gaussian fit) of all spaxels within 1 R_{e}.
- Unit: km/s
- Data Type: Float32


#### ha_gsigma_hi

- Column Name: ha_gsigma_hi
- Description: H-alpha velocity dispersion (from Gaussian fit) at 97.5% growth of all valid spaxels.
- Unit: km/s
- Data Type: Float32


#### ha_gsigma_hi_clip

- Column Name: ha_gsigma_hi_clip
- Description: H-alpha velocity dispersion (from Gaussian fit) at 97.5% growth after iteratively clipping 3-sigma outliers.
- Unit: km/s
- Data Type: Float32


#### emline_rchi2_1re

- Column Name: emline_rchi2_1re
- Description: Median reduced chi^{2} of the continuum+emission-line fit within 1 R_{e}.
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32

#### sfr_1re

- Column Name: sfr_1re
- Description: Simple estimate of the star-formation rate within 1 effective radius based on the Gaussian-fitted Ha flux; log(SFR) = log L_{Ha} - 41.27 (Kennicutt &amp; Evans [2012, ARAA, 50, 531], citing Murphy et al. [2011, ApJ, 737, 67] and Hao et al. [2011, ApJ, 741, 124]; Kroupa IMF), where L_{Ha} = 4-Ç EML_FLUX_1RE (LDIST_Z)^{2} and ''no'' attentuation correction has been applied.
- Unit: h^{-2} M_{sun}/yr
- Data Type: Float32


#### sfr_tot

- Column Name: sfr_tot
- Description: Simple estimate of the star-formation rate within the IFU field-of-view based on the Gaussian-fitted Ha flux; log(SFR) = log L_{Ha} - 41.27 (Kennicutt &amp; Evans [2012, ARAA, 50, 531], citing Murphy et al. [2011, ApJ, 737, 67] and Hao et al. [2011, ApJ, 741, 124]; Kroupa IMF), where L_{Ha} = 4-Ç EML_FLUX_TOT (LDIST_Z)^{2} and ''no'' attentuation correction has been applied.
- Unit: h^{-2} M_{sun}/yr
- Data Type: Float32


#### htmid

- Column Name: htmid
- Description: 20-level deep Hierarchical Triangular Mesh ID
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int64


#### pk

- Column Name: pk
- Description: Primary key, a sequential unique identifier
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int64
